data.body:
HANDOFF STATE (end of session 2) — 5 of 7 stories DONE (closed+signed): S1 bored-tag-sale, S2 urge-brook-plume, S3 will-tile-plum, S4 perky-art-yodel, and story 8903 gall-plume-adder (continuous auto-deploy, LIVE on box i-00880b2c7f13527c5). Epic stays in_progress; REMAINING: S5 leafy-vogue-ingot (OPEN, now unblocked by S3 close) + S6 norm-dam-swab (OPEN, depends on S5).

KEY OUTCOMES THIS SESSION:
- 8903 continuous auto-deploy: box-adapted (mirror clone + rsync into copy-based /opt/rebar; review-bot-only v1 auto-apply, config detect+signal). LIVE: rebar-autodeploy.timer enabled, review-bot redeployed to S2 code (S5 PREREQ SATISFIED — bot no longer pre-S2), self-heal + blast-radius + autonomous deploy all verified live; deploy_errors CloudWatch alarm applied; ADR 0026. Landed 229/230/231.
- S3: all 6 ACs proven live; AC4 (change 234 PS3 MERGE_FIRST_PARENT_UPDATE -> LLM-Review CARRIED / Verified re-ran) + AC5 (concurrency cancel-in-progress) captured. Evidence committed to docs/88ab-feature-branch-evidence.md (change 239).
- S4: feature-branch flow docs (CONTRIBUTING §4, CLAUDE.md, review-bot-ops merge-change ops, mirror-lock two-vote fix); PR-era sweep clean. Change 237.
- fern-belief-gap CLOSED (change 236: exclude feature/** from mirror push CI).

REMAINING WORK FOR NEXT SESSION:
- S5 (leafy-vogue-ingot): 7-scenario live E2E + a COMMITTED scenario script (alongside infra/gerrit/reviewbot-e2e.sh) + COMMITTED evidence. NOTE: the completion verifier requires run-log evidence as a committed repo artifact (not just ticket comments) — extend docs/88ab-feature-branch-evidence.md. Already proven: scenario 4 = S3 AC4; scenario 3 partial = S3 AC3; scenario 7 partial = S1/S2. Bot is S2-ready (prereq met).
- S6 (norm-dam-swab): policy + back-out + cost, from S5 data.
- Follow-ups: spy-luge-wool (bug, -1/INDETERMINATE root-cause via /joe-debug), sly-sloth-bay (task, emit merge_change_409_guard event — discovered_from S2).

FLAG: another session's Gerrit change 241 proposes 'ADR 0026-0029' (reconciler convergence) which COLLIDES with the merged ADR 0026 (autodeploy) — that session must renumber before submit.

ENV: AWS root authed; box reachable via SSM; Gerrit admin = JoeOakhartNava. Box: auto-deploy live+healthy, review-bot=S2, gerrit container untouched (ef56267f).
